case_title: ALBA LUZ LEVIA VS. LUZ MARIA CASTILLO

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEIVA, ALBA LUZ RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CASTILLO, LUZ MARIA AN INDIVIDUAL DBA CASTILLO EXPRESS $3,913.24 PRINCIPAL, $203.38 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,116.62, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
